topic: Interventions for common mental and physical health conditions in clinical or community settings
inclusion: Randomised controlled trials, systematic reviews, meta-analyses, or observational cohort studies
Studies reporting at least one clinical health outcome (e.g., symptom severity, mortality, hospitalisation, quality of life)
Studies on mental health, cardiovascular disease, diabetes, infectious disease, maternal health, or chronic pain
Studies with a defined intervention (pharmacological, behavioural, digital, or structural)
exclusion: Studies not related to health or medicine
Studies primarily about economics, finance, technology, or education (unless the primary outcome is a health measure)
Animal studies or laboratory studies without human participants
Studies with purely environmental or social outcomes and no clinical health endpoint
Opinion pieces, editorials, or commentaries without original data
